title: verbascum blattaria f. albiflorum
intro: Verbascum blattaria f. albiflorum, also known as White Mullein, is a biennial plant belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its high mucilage content. The health benefits of White Mullein include its ability to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to alleviate skin irritations and wounds. White Mullein can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
